description: Angle A of NAHR substrate detection. minimap2 self-alignment on ±50 kb flanks around the candidate's two breakpoints. TRUSTED angle for NAHR call; BISER2 catalog lookup (sd_substrate_biser2) is a cross-check. Emits sorted BAM + strand-colored BED for IGV inspection. Flag set: -ax asm10 -X --eqx --secondary=yes -N 50 -p 0.1.
question: Q4

q4a_mm2_ran.description: True if minimap2 completed without error for this candidate.

q4a_mm2_preset_used.description: minimap2 preset selected via -ax. Default asm10.

q4a_mm2_flank_bp.description: Flank window size extracted around each breakpoint.

q4a_mm2_mechanism_left.description: Mechanism call for the LEFT breakpoint. NAHR_CANDIDATE = ≥500 bp inverted hit at ≥85% identity. NAHR_POSSIBLE = ≥100 bp. COMPLEX = shorter hits only. NHEJ_CANDIDATE = no inverted hits at all.

q4a_mm2_mechanism_right.description: Mechanism call for the RIGHT breakpoint. Same enum as left.

q4a_mm2_best_inv_length_left.description: Alignment length (bp) of the best inverted hit at the left breakpoint.

q4a_mm2_best_inv_length_right.description: Alignment length (bp) of the best inverted hit at the right breakpoint.

q4a_mm2_best_inv_identity_left.description: Identity (%) of the best inverted hit at the left breakpoint.

q4a_mm2_best_inv_identity_right.description: Identity (%) of the best inverted hit at the right breakpoint.

q4a_mm2_n_inverted_hits.description: Total inverted alignments across both flanks after post-filter.

q4a_mm2_n_direct_hits.description: Total direct alignments across both flanks after post-filter.

q4a_mm2_bam_path.description: Absolute path to self_align.bam (sorted + indexed). Load in IGV for inspection.

q4a_mm2_bed_path.description: Absolute path to inverted_hits.bed (BED9 with red/green itemRgb by strand).

q4a_mm2_cmd_log.description: Absolute path to self_align.cmd.txt containing exact minimap2 + samtools invocation.
